'''Grakkata''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who managed to escape from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] some time during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She hid out within [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]] and eventually became a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]], attacking Imperial convoys with her [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the ''[[Treespirit]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
